name: RAVIKUMAR
title: Java Full Stack & Agentic AI Developer
summary: Highly skilled Java Full Stack Developer with proven expertise in designing, developing, and maintaining robust, scalable, and secure Java-based applications. Proficient in building RESTful APIs using Spring Boot and Spring Framework, alongside developing responsive, interactive user interfaces with Angular. Adept at writing clean, efficient, and well-documented code while participating in Agile development processes and code reviews. Possesses strong analytical and problem-solving skills with hands-on experience in API management, data modeling, DevOps practices, and cross-functional collaboration with UI/UX designers, product managers, and QA to ensure optimal application performance and quality.

skills.frontend: Angular 15/17, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, RxJS, Responsive UI
skills.backend: Java 17/18, Spring Boot 3.x, Spring Framework, RESTful APIs, Microservices, Spring Security
skills.api_tools: Swagger, Postman, API Management, Model Context Protocol (MCP), OpenAI GPT
skills.testing_devops: CI/CD Pipelines, DevOps Practices, Docker, Jenkins, Git, JIRA, JUnit, Mockito
skills.databases: SQL (PostgreSQL, MS SQL Server), NoSQL (MongoDB), Redis, Data Modelling, JPA, Hibernate
skills.soft_skills: Analytical & Problem-Solving Skills, Code Reviews, Agile Development, Cross-functional Teamwork

bullets: Designed and developed robust, scalable, and secure multi-tenant Java-based enterprise applications using Spring Boot and Angular 15, streamlining template management operations for over 40 enterprise clients.
Built and maintained backend services and RESTful APIs, utilizing Swagger and Postman for comprehensive API management and documentation.
Collaborated directly with cross-functional teams including UI/UX designers, product managers, and QA to seamlessly integrate frontend components with backend services.
Implemented a Java-based Template Data Access Object (DAO) system utilizing Spring Boot and JPA for advanced data modeling and efficient management of tenant-specific data.
Participated in Agile development processes, performing peer code reviews and ensuring all deliverables consisted of clean, efficient, and well-documented code following best practices.
Troubleshot, debugged, and upgraded existing systems, identifying root causes to reduce average page load latency by over 25% and ensure maximum application performance.
Authored Angular component logic with strict testing coverage, clearing localized client state and session storage during secure application logouts.
Championed CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices, managing real-time data pipelines (Kafka/Redis) processing 100,000+ IoT data points daily, automating release cycles using Docker and Jenkins.

projects.name: Agentic AI Integration & MCP Architecture
bullets: Led a deep R&D project to re-architect agentic tool integration, transitioning from monolithic API wrappers to a highly scalable Model Context Protocol (MCP) native mesh.
Successfully stress-tested and benchmarked agent task completion utilizing an MCP server stack for GitHub and PostgreSQL databases.
Achieved unprecedented efficiency by reducing complex AI integration tasks from 4 hours to just 12 minutes through protocol-native architecture.

projects.name: AdaptiveFlow AI
projects.tech: Java, Spring Boot, Angular, OpenAI GPT-4o, WebSocket
bullets: Architected a Real-Time Cognitive Process Intelligence Engine for autonomous business process monitoring.
Integrated OpenAI GPT-4o-mini for natural language business querying and explainable anomaly detection, supported by robust SQL data modeling.
Built real-time WebSocket STOMP pipelines delivering predictive intelligence across 6 business process types.

certifications: Java Spring Framework, Spring Boot & Spring AI (Generative AI) – Udemy
JavaScript Pro: Mastering Advanced Concepts and Techniques – Udemy
Java Full Stack Development Certification – JSpiders
